perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a static graphic featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, promotional text in Traditional Chinese, a cartoon avatar, and a large plush fox. (2) A rapid series of cuts follows, showcasing various retail products—ranging from packaged snacks and drinks to fresh fruits, meats, and pastries—displayed on warehouse shelves. (3) Each product shot is framed centrally, often with a slight camera pan or zoom to highlight the packaging.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music track begins immediately and plays continuously. (2) A male narrator speaks rapidly in Mandarin, announcing each product's name and its discounted price in synchronization with the visual cuts. (3) No ambient store noise is audible; the audio consists entirely of a clean studio-recorded vocal track layered over the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: For every item, text overlays display the product name (e.g., 'KOH 純椰子汁'), '原價' (Original Price), a minus sign with the discount amount, and '特價' (Special Price) in bold red or yellow fonts. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: The intro displays '好市多每週特價速報' (Costco Weekly Special Report) and the date range '10/06~10/12'. (3) Call-to-action: The text '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us) appears at the beginning to encourage engagement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price showcase -> Outro graphic

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real people or body parts are visible; the focus is exclusively on inanimate products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various sections of a Costco warehouse, including high-reaching industrial shelves, refrigerated display units, and bakery counters.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a digital promotional flyer for Costco, aiming to quickly inform viewers of specific weekly discounts to drive foot traffic and sales. It uses high-speed editing and clear pricing text to maximize information density for social media consumption.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists promotional prices and discounts for a wide array of brands sold within Costco.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced price narration synchronized with product jump-cuts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content is highly utilitarian, designed for local consumers in Taiwan seeking value. The use of Traditional Chinese and TWD pricing confirms the regional target.
